title: Fermentation Lactate
script_summary: An insightful dive into fermentation lactate and its biological significance.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you lactate isn’t just a byproduct?
Lactate forms during fermentation, a critical process in cells for energy.
But what does this mean for our bodies and performance?
Lactate isn’t the villain! It fuels muscle recovery and boosts endurance.
Understanding lactate helps optimize training—science in action!
Want more cool science insights? Hit that follow button!
